category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes ldeep as an in-depth LDAP enumeration utility.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation surface for usage and options.

tags_sources: Official GitHub repository owner/name franc-pentest/ldeep and description indicate pentesting/security use.
